title: In 2002, cavers found a hidden skeleton that revealed an ancient Australian predator
summary_full: Explorers found an ancient marsupial lion skeleton in a Nullarbor Plain cave. This discovery offers a unique look at extinct life. The cave's stable environment preserved the fossil for millions of years. Researchers are studying the skeleton to understand the predator's strength and hunting abilities. This find reveals a hidden world beneath the desert surface.
